subject: fix(claude): remove hardcoded pattern list, use directory listing instead
body:
Replaced the static list of 8 pattern filenames with a curl command that
lists the glow-props docs/implementations/ directory dynamically. New
patterns added to glow-props will be discovered automatically.

Tags: documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: patch
